summary: Completed testing of Pending Bills feature: standalone page at /admin/pending-bills, Pending Bills tab in Item Master, Settings billing_emails section, and Inventory stock adjustment. Backend API tests: 12 passed, 2 skipped (no pending bills available for complete flow test). Frontend UI: all features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/pending-bills returns 200 with bills array
Backend: GET /api/admin/pending-bills?status=pending filter works
Backend: GET /api/admin/pending-bills?status=billed filter works
Backend: Pending bill structure has required fields (id, ticket_id, ticket_number, company_name, status, items, subtotal, total_gst, grand_total)
Backend: Billed bills have bill_number and billed_at fields
Backend: PUT /api/admin/pending-bills/{id}/complete returns 404 for invalid ID
Backend: PUT /api/admin/pending-bills/{id}/complete rejects already billed bills
Backend: GET /api/admin/settings returns billing_emails field
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings can update billing_emails
Backend: POST /api/admin/inventory/adjust with type='purchase' adds stock
Backend: Bill totals calculation verified (subtotal + GST = grand total)
Backend: Bill items have added_by field
Frontend: /admin/pending-bills page loads with header 'Pending Bills'
Frontend: Stats cards visible (Pending: 0, Billed: 1, Pending Amount: 0.00)
Frontend: Filter pills (All, Pending, Billed) visible and functional
Frontend: Bill row shows ticket #TEST-9999 with 'Billed' badge, INV: INV-2026-0001
Frontend: Expanded bill shows items table with Part, Added By, Qty, Price, GST, Total columns
Frontend: Expanded bill shows grand total footer (Subtotal, GST, Grand Total)
Frontend: Billed bill shows billing info (Billed by, Invoice number)
Frontend: Item Master has 5 tabs (Categories, Products, Bundles, Inventory, Pending Bills)
Frontend: Item Master Pending Bills tab shows same component with stats and bills
Frontend: Inventory tab shows 9 items with Adjust buttons
Frontend: Stock Adjust modal has Type (Purchase), Quantity, Unit Cost, Notes fields
Frontend: Settings page has 'Billing Team Emails' section with add/remove capability
Frontend: Billing emails appear as removable chips after adding

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 passed, 2 skipped - no pending bills for complete flow)

features: Bill rows with ticket number, company, status badge, invoice number, item count, amount
Expandable rows showing items table with Part, Added By, Qty, Price, GST, Total
Grand Total footer in expanded view
Billed by info with timestamp and invoice number
5 tabs: Categories, Products, Bundles, Inventory, Pending Bills
Pending Bills tab shows same component as standalone page
Billing Team Emails section with description
Adjust button on each inventory row
Modal with Type dropdown (Purchase, Return, Adjustment, Initial Stock)

mark_as_done_flow.note: Existing bill #TEST-9999 already billed. To test Mark as Done flow, need to create a new pending bill via engineer visit checkout.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Pending Bills features tested. Existing bill #TEST-9999 is already billed with INV-2026-0001. To test the full Mark as Done flow, a new pending bill needs to be created first by: (1) reset a ticket to 'accepted', (2) assign engineer, (3) start visit, (4) request parts, (5) checkout with resolution='fixed'. The Settings billing_emails has test data: billing@test.com, accounts@test.com. SMTP not configured so billing email notifications will fail silently but bill creation succeeds.
